creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
In https://lists.freebsd.org/, add a "non-members can post?" column, with values yes/no/subject to moderation.

In individual list pages (eg, in https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-test or some other easily reachable page for each list) where non-members can't post unmoderated, explain why that restriction was deemed necessary.

Note: implementing this may require new features in mail/mlmmj and or mail/mlmmj-webview.
